priority_1.name: Authority Acquisition
actions: Send 5 V2 test emails (only after embed X-Frame-Options fix deployed)
Send 8 Jun 13 follow-ups to previous outreach targets
Monitor replies daily — respond within 24 hours per playbook
Track embeds, backlinks, and referral traffic
Research 5 new prospects daily (not send — just research)
priority_1.kpi: First reply, first backlink, or first embed by Jun 26

priority_2.name: Content Click Monitoring
actions: Weekly GSC performance check for existing indexed pages
No new content creation unless tied to specific outreach offer
priority_2.kpi: First content click from organic search

priority_3.name: Indexing Request Monitoring
actions: Manual GSC URL inspection only for high-priority pages

priority_4.name: Real Page Internal Links
actions: Only add internal links tied to specific KPI pages
No bulk internal linking without Auditor review
Link from relevant blog posts to calculator/decision pages naturally
priority_4.kpi: Improved crawl depth for target pages

blocked_activities: activity-only SEO (changes that don't drive measurable results)
daily_checklist: Check outreach replies → respond per playbook
Check GSC for new backlink appearances (weekly)
No content tweaks unless triggered by specific KPI opportunity
